hero.title: Hairspray
hero.reason: In honor of Adopt a Shelter Pet Day, Hairspray is a fun and upbeat film that features a variety of pet adoption themes and a heartwarming story about self-acceptance and community, making it a great choice for this observance.
hero.blurb: Hairspray is a classic musical comedy that will have you dancing in your seat with its catchy tunes and lovable characters. With a talented cast and impressive choreography, this film is sure to delight audiences of all ages.

released.title: Disturbia
released.reason: Released today in 2007, Disturbia is a gripping thriller that showcases Shia LaBeouf's talents as a young actor and pays homage to the classic Hitchcock film Rear Window, making it a notable release on this day.
released.blurb: Disturbia is a tense and suspenseful film that will keep you on the edge of your seat as you follow the story of a teenage boy who becomes convinced that his neighbor is a serial killer. With its clever plot twists and strong performances, this movie is a must-see for fans of the thriller genre.

birthday.title: Clue
birthday.reason: Happy birthday to Christopher Lloyd, Clue is a hilarious comedy classic that showcases his talents as a comedic actor and features a star-studded cast, including Tim Curry and Madeline Kahn.
birthday.blurb: Clue is a sidesplitting mystery comedy that will have you laughing out loud with its witty dialogue and physical humor. With its intricate plot and talented cast, this film is a must-see for fans of the genre.

awful.title: Son of the Mask
awful.reason: This infamous comedy is often cited as one of the worst sequels of all time, with a convoluted plot and cringeworthy performances that make it a fascinatingly bad watch.
awful.blurb: Son of the Mask is a laughably bad film that will have you questioning the sanity of the people who made it. With its nonsensical plot and atrocious acting, this movie is a trainwreck that you won't be able to look away from.
